description: User clicks the 'From $127' button for the 6:10am Virgin Australia flight to expand fare options
frame_description: The user clicks on the price button for a specific flight, causing the fare type selection area to expand below the flight row.

description: User hovers over the different fare types (Lite, Choice, Flex) to review the inclusions
frame_description: The cursor moves across the 'Select Departing Fare Type' section, lingering over the Flex and Lite options.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare option
frame_description: The user selects the $127 Lite fare, and the button visual state changes to a green checkmark.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...'
frame_description: A white loading screen with a spinner and text appears over the flight results.

description: The page transitions from departing flight selection to return flight selection
frame_description: The URL changes and the page content updates to show 'Select Return Flight' for Melbourne to Adelaide.

description: User examines the available return flight options
frame_description: The user remains on the return flight selection page, likely reading the flight times and prices.
